entries.source: Important events, facts learned, and uncertainty notes stay visible.
entries.value: Matukio muhimu, ukweli uliopatikana, na madokezo ya kutokuwa na uhakika yanabaki kuonekana.

entries.source: In 4 sentences, explain how one assumption change moves revenue, cash flow, and value. Name one thing you would check before trusting it.
entries.value: Katika sentensi 4, eleza jinsi mabadiliko ya dhana moja yanavyohamisha mapato, mtiririko wa pesa, na thamani. Taja jambo moja ambalo ungeangalia kabla ya kuliwekea imani.

entries.source: Increase the challenge. Have the historical person defend their worldview more forcefully while the historian tracks weak claims.
entries.value: Ongeza changamoto. Mfanye mtu wa kihistoria atetee mtazamo wake wa ulimwengu kwa nguvu zaidi huku mwanahistoria akifuatilia madai dhaifu.

entries.source: Individual crowd interactions are plausible composites
entries.value: Mwingiliano wa watu binafsi katika umati ni mchanganyiko unaowezekana

entries.source: Individual routes through smoke are plausible, not exact
entries.value: Njia za watu binafsi kupitia moshi zinawezekana, si kamili

entries.source: Interpret the target internally and begin immediately with a real diagnostic question.
entries.value: Tafsiri lengo ndani kwa ndani na uanze mara moja kwa swali halisi la utambuzi.

entries.source: Invite a figure into the room.
It definitely rises because sales are higher.
entries.value: Hakika inapanda kwa sababu mauzo ni ya juu.

entries.source: It helps you explain profit potential, not just market size.
entries.value: Inakusaidia kuelezea uwezekano wa faida, si ukubwa wa soko pekee.

entries.source: It helps you predict policy, taxes, shortages, and market reactions without memorizing diagrams.
entries.value: Inakusaidia kutabiri sera, kodi, uhaba, na miitikio ya soko bila kukariri michoro.

entries.source: It is impossible to know anything until terminal value is calculated.
entries.value: Haiwezekani kujua chochote hadi thamani ya mwisho ihesabiwe.

entries.source: It lets you revise for logic, not just polish wording.
entries.value: Inakuwezesha kurekebisha kwa ajili ya mantiki, si kung'arisha maneno pekee.

entries.source: It makes you faster because each test either proves or removes a hypothesis.
entries.value: Inakufanya uwe na kasi zaidi kwa sababu kila jaribio ama linathibitisha au kuondoa dhana.

entries.source: It may fall because costs and working capital can absorb the sales gain.
entries.value: Inaweza kushuka kwa sababu gharama na mtaji wa kufanyia kazi vinaweza kufyonza faida ya mauzo.

entries.source: Jumps to valuation before reading the operating model.
entries.value: Anarukia tathmini kabla ya kusoma mfano wa uendeshaji.
Kashmere Gate ilikuwa na umuhimu wa kijeshi

entries.source: Keep governance, money, labor, technology, and culture in view.
entries.value: Zingatia utawala, pesa, kazi, teknolojia, na utamaduni.

entries.source: Keep the sidecar quieter unless something needs correction.
entries.value: Weka sidecar katika hali ya utulivu isipokuwa kama kuna kitu kinahitaji kurekebishwa.

entries.value: Ufalme wa Uingereza chini ya Charles II

entries.value: Ufalme wa Ufaransa katika mgogoro wa kimapinduzi

entries.source: Learn how they thought, worked, planned, wrote, governed, or experimented.
entries.value: Jifunze jinsi walivyofikiri, walivyofanya kazi, walivyopanga, walivyoandika, walivyotawala, au walivyofanya majaribio.

entries.source: Learn supply and demand by working through examples
entries.value: Jifunze kuhusu ugavi na mahitaji kwa kufanya mifano
Ndoo ya ngozi ya kuzimia moto
Hali ya kisheria ilichagiza maisha ya kila siku

entries.source: List what has to be true for the idea to work.
entries.value: Orodhesha mambo ambayo lazima yawe ya kweli ili wazo hilo lifanye kazi.

entries.source: Listing the five labels without judging their strength does not explain whether the industry is attractive.
entries.value: Kuorodhesha lebo tano bila kuhukumu nguvu zake hakuelezi ikiwa sekta hiyo inavutia.

entries.source: Literate helper near records, letters, or multilingual exchange
entries.value: Msaidizi mwenye ujuzi wa kusoma na kuandika karibu na rekodi, barua, au mabadilishano ya lugha nyingi
Mtu asiye wa tabaka la juu mwenye ujuzi wa kusoma na kuandika

entries.source: Livres, sous, bread prices as daily pressure
entries.value: Livres, sous, bei za mkate kama shinikizo la kila siku

entries.source: Local working language with class-appropriate fluency
entries.value: Lugha ya kazi ya ndani yenye ufasaha unaofaa darasa

entries.source: Lock useful notes only after the idea has been used.
entries.value: Funga madokezo muhimu tu baada ya wazo kutumika.
Njia za kuingilia Daraja la London

entries.source: Look for the causal link. Which variable actually changed, and what does it affect next?
entries.value: Tafuta kiungo cha kisababishi. Ni kigezo kipi kilibadilika kweli, na kinaathiri nini baadaye?

entries.source: Make the first rough structure before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes."
entries.value: Tengeneza muundo wa kwanza mbaya kabla ya kutoa ushauri. Anza na: "Nimetengeneza muundo wa kwanza mbaya. Hariri chochote. Nitaitikia mabadiliko yako."

entries.source: Manipulation proves you can use the model, not just repeat it.
entries.value: Ujanja unathibitisha kuwa unaweza kutumia modeli, sio tu kuirudia.

entries.source: Map allies, enemies, critics, patrons, and pressure groups around this person at this moment.
entries.value: Chora ramani ya washirika, maadui, wakosoaji, wafadhili, na vikundi vya shinikizo karibu na mtu huyu wakati huu.

entries.source: market, household, workshop, port, school, or neighborhood
entries.value: soko, kaya, karakana, bandari, shule, au mtaa

entries.source: Markets move when incentives change. Demand captures willingness to buy, supply captures willingness to sell, and price is where the pressure balances.
entries.value: Masoko hubadilika wakati motisha zinapobadilika. Mahitaji huwakilisha utayari wa kununua, usambazaji huwakilisha utayari wa kuuza, na bei ndipo shinikizo linaposawazika.
Masoko hufanya kazi chini ya muda uliopangwa

entries.source: Markets, homes, workshops, courts, maps, and decision points.
entries.value: Masoko, nyumba, karakana, mahakama, ramani, na sehemu za kufanyia maamuzi.

entries.source: Merge the accepted changes into a clean current version, then update the decision log and open questions.
entries.value: Unganisha mabadiliko yaliyokubaliwa katika toleo safi la sasa, kisha usasishe kumbukumbu ya maamuzi na maswali yaliyo wazi.
Sanamu ya Daudi ya Michelangelo iliwekwa mwaka 1504

entries.source: Misses become a smaller review deck

entries.source: Modern assumptions about equal citizenship would be immediately out of place.
entries.value: Dhana za kisasa kuhusu uraia sawa zingekuwa nje ya muktadha mara moja.

entries.source: Modern talk of individual artistic genius can sound naive without patronage, guild, and civic context.
entries.value: Mazungumzo ya kisasa kuhusu kipaji cha sanaa cha mtu binafsi yanaweza kusikika kama ya kijinga bila ufadhili, chama, na muktadha wa kiraia.

entries.source: More immersive, with tighter limits on what you can know and say.
entries.value: Inayozama zaidi, ikiwa na mipaka mikali zaidi ya kile unachoweza kujua na kusema.

entries.source: Move carefully and notice ordinary life before judging.
entries.value: Sogea kwa uangalifu na uangalie maisha ya kawaida kabla ya kuhukumu.

entries.source: Move one control, watch the result, then explain why the output changed.
entries.value: Sogeza kidhibiti kimoja, tazama matokeo, kisha ueleze kwa nini matokeo yamebadilika.

entries.source: Moving every control at once makes it hard to know what caused the result.
entries.value: Kusogeza kila kidhibiti kwa wakati mmoja hufanya iwe vigumu kujua nini kilisababisha matokeo.

entries.source: Moving on after recognition instead of testing recall and transfer.
entries.value: Kuendelea baada ya kutambua badala ya kupima kukumbuka na kuhamisha maarifa.

entries.value: Mamlaka ya ishara ya Mughal chini ya udhibiti wa waasi, inayopingwa na Kampuni ya East India

entries.source: Multiple explanations can help, but the proof is what you can do after reading.
entries.value: Maelezo mengi yanaweza kusaidia, lakini uthibitisho ni kile unachoweza kufanya baada ya kusoma.

entries.source: Name the input you changed, the immediate effect, and the final result.
entries.value: Taja ingizo ulilobadilisha, athari ya haraka, na matokeo ya mwisho.

entries.source: Name the topic and your current guess. The app builds a ladder of questions, hints, evidence, and synthesis.
entries.value: Taja mada na nadhani yako ya sasa. Programu hujenga ngazi ya maswali, vidokezo, ushahidi, na usanisi.

entries.source: Open the evidence drawer. Label high-confidence facts, plausible reconstructions, contested claims, and things you must not fabricate.
